positive: A minimalist, stylish design featuring a stylized celestial raccoon silhouette nestled among scattered crescent moons, constellations, and abstract geometric stardust. The raccoon should be in a playful, yet elegant pose. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, soft gold, and matte black on a crisp white background. The style should be a blend of modern vector art, whimsical etching, and negative space design. Strong linework, perfect symmetry, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Clean silhouettes, centered composition.
